info.name: CodexAI Backend API
info.description: Complete REST API for CodexAI backend with User and Course management endpoints

request.description: Register a new user with email, password, fullName, and phoneNumber. Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers.
Login user with email and password. Returns accessToken, idToken, and refreshToken.
Verify email address with OTP code sent to email
Resend email verification code to user's email address
Initiate password reset flow. Sends password reset code to user's email.
Complete password reset with confirmation code from email
Logout user and invalidate all tokens. Can use accessToken in body or Authorization header.
Sign up or login with Google OAuth. (Implementation pending - awaiting Google OAuth token validation)
Creates a new user with the provided information
Retrieves a specific user by their ID
Updates one or more fields of an existing user. All fields are optional.
Deletes a user permanently from the database

query.description: Number of items to return (default: 10, max: 100)

request.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all users with optional pagination support

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Web Development",
  "duration": "12 weeks",
  "iconName": "Code",
  "description": "Learn full-stack web development with modern technologies",
  "features": [
    "HTML/CSS",
    "JavaScript",
    "React",
    "Node.js",
    "MongoDB"
  ],
  "projectCount": "5",
  "link": "/courses/web-dev",
  "colorClass": {
    "from": "from-blue-500",
    "to": "to-cyan-500",
    "icon": "text-blue-600",
    "badge": "bg-blue-100",
    "border": "border-blue-200",
    "hoverBorder": "hover:border-blue-400",
    "hoverShadow": "hover:shadow-blue-500/20"
  },
  "isFlagship": true,
  "image": "https://example.com/courses/web-dev.jpg",
  "color": "#0066FF",
  "highlights": [
    "Industry-standard technologies",
    "Live project experience",
    "1-on-1 mentoring sessions",
    "Job placement assistance"
  ],
  "curriculum": [
    {
      "week": "1-2",
      "title": "HTML & CSS Fundamentals",
      "topics": [
        "HTML5 structure",
        "CSS layouts",
        "Responsive design",
        "Accessibility basics"
      ]
    },
    {
      "week": "3-5",
      "title": "JavaScript Essentials",
      "topics": [
        "ES6+ syntax",
        "DOM manipulation",
        "Async programming",
        "API integration"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outcomes": [
    "Build responsive websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript",
    "Master React for building dynamic user interfaces",
    "Develop backend APIs with Node.js and Express",
    "Design and manage databases with MongoDB",
    "Deploy applications to production environments"
  ]
}

request.description: Creates a new course with the provided information
Retrieves a specific course by its ID

body.raw:
{
  "duration": "10 weeks",
  "projectCount": "6",
  "isFlagship": false,
  "image": "https://example.com/courses/web-dev-updated.jpg",
  "color": "#FF6600",
  "highlights": [
    "Advanced techniques",
    "Portfolio projects",
    "Internship opportunities"
  ],
  "curriculum": [
    {
      "week": "1-3",
      "title": "HTML & CSS Mastery",
      "topics": [
        "Semantic HTML",
        "CSS Grid",
        "Flexbox",
        "Mobile optimization"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outcomes": [
    "Deploy full-stack applications",
    "Lead development teams",
    "Contribute to open-source"
  ]
}

request.description: Updates one or more fields of an existing course. All fields are optional.
Deletes a course permanently from the database

query.description: Number of items to return (default: 10, max: 100)

request.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all courses with optional filtering and pagination support
Creates a new brochure associated with a course. The courseId must exist in the courses table.
Retrieves a specific brochure by its ID
Updates one or more fields of an existing brochure. All fields are optional. If updating courseId, it must exist in the courses table.
Deletes a brochure permanently from the database

query.description: Number of items to return (default: 10, max: 100)

request.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all brochures with optional filtering by courseId and pagination support
Submit a new brochure enquiry. Required fields: fullName, email, phoneNumber, course, courseId. Auto-sends confirmation email to customer and notification to admin.
Retrieves a specific brochure enquiry by its ID (ENQ-timestamp-uuid format)

query.description: Number of items to return (default: 20, max: 100)
Base64-encoded pagination token for next page

request.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all brochure enquiries with optional filtering by status and courseId
Update brochure enquiry status and/or admin notes. Valid statuses: pending, brochure-sent, contacted. Auto-sends brochure email to customer when status changes to brochure-sent.
Create a Razorpay payment order. Optional: include couponCode to apply discount.
Verify payment signature and confirm payment after customer completes Razorpay flow
Get the current status of a payment order by order ID

query.description: Number of items to return (default: 20, max: 100)

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all payment records
Retrieve a specific payment record by its payment ID (e.g., pay_xxxxx)
Retrieve all payment records for a specific user by their Cognito sub (userId)
Admin enrolls a student in a course with No-Cost EMI. Creates N installment records based on course emiInstallments and auto-generates a Razorpay Payment Link for installment 1.
Generate a Razorpay Payment Link for a specific pending installment. The previous installment must be paid before generating the next one.
Fetch all EMI enrollments. Returns annotated records with pendingAmount and nextInstallment summary.
Fetch all active, non-expired coupons available for students
Get detailed information about a specific coupon by its code
Create a new coupon code. Type can be 'flat' (₹ amount) or 'percentage' (% discount)
Update fields of an existing coupon (value, maxUses, expiresAt, isActive, etc.)
Delete a coupon code permanently from the system
Validate a coupon code for a given amount and get the discount calculation
Server-to-server webhook from Razorpay. Automatic enrollment safety net if frontend fails. Not meant for manual testing - Razorpay sends these automatically. For setup, see RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_GUIDE.md
Upload support documents to S3. File must be base64 encoded. Max 10MB. Allowed types: PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, images, TXT, ZIP
Submit a support query/ticket. Categories: technical, billing, account, course, general. Documents are optional S3 URLs.

query.description: Number of items to return (default: 20, max: 100)
Filter by status (open, in-progress, resolved, closed)

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all support tickets. Optionally filter by status.

query.description: Email address to filter support tickets by

request.description: Retrieve all support tickets submitted by a specific email address
Update a support ticket's status, add admin comments, or append responses. Valid statuses: open, in-progress, resolved, closed.
Permanently delete a support ticket by its ticket ID (e.g., TKT-timestamp-uuid)
Create a new legal document (Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, Refund Policy, Cookie Policy, etc.)

query.description: Number of items to return (default: 20, max: 100)

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all legal documents with pagination support
Retrieves a specific legal document by its ID
Updates one or more fields of an existing legal document. All fields are optional.
Deletes a legal document permanently from the database

query.description: Number of items to return (default: 20, max: 100)

request.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all news posts with optional filtering by category, status, and search
Retrieves a specific news post by its ID

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Latest AI Trends in 2025",
  "content": "Comprehensive overview of artificial intelligence trends shaping the tech industry...",
  "category": "Artificial Intelligence",
  "description": "Discover the latest AI trends and their impact on the industry",
  "imageUrl": "https://example.com/images/ai-trends.jpg",
  "status": "draft",
  "author": "Admin",
  "tags": ["AI", "Machine Learning", "Technology", "2025"]
}

request.description: Creates a new news post (admin only). Status can be 'draft', 'published', or 'archived'. Default is 'draft'.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Latest AI Trends in 2025 - Updated",
  "content": "Updated comprehensive overview of artificial intelligence trends...",
  "category": "Artificial Intelligence",
  "description": "Discover the latest AI trends and their impact on the industry",
  "imageUrl": "https://example.com/images/ai-trends-updated.jpg",
  "tags": ["AI", "Machine Learning", "Technology", "2025", "Updates"]
}

request.description: Updates one or more fields of an existing news post (admin only). All fields are optional.
Deletes a news post permanently from the database (admin only)
Publish a news post (change status from draft to published) and set publishedAt timestamp (admin only)
Archive a news post (change status to archived) to remove from active listings (admin only)

variable.description: JWT access token from login response
Replace with an actual user ID from your database
Replace with an actual course ID from your database
Replace with an actual brochure ID from your database
Replace with an actual brochure enquiry ID from submit-brochure response
Razorpay order ID from create-order response
Razorpay payment ID from payment completion
Coupon code for testing (e.g., FLAT100, OFF20)
Razorpay payment signature from webhook or client
Replace with an actual legal document ID from your database
Replace with an actual news post ID from your database
Replace with an actual support ticket ID from submit-query response (TKT-timestamp-uuid format)
